description: Onboarding Wizard - a multi-step first-time setup flow shown when no setup is complete. Steps: Welcome + workspace name, Connect email, Import leads, Create first template, Create first sequence, Launch. Includes progress bar, skip option, dashboard checklist widget, and confetti animation on completion.
steps: Create apps/web/src/components/onboarding/OnboardingWizard.tsx - full-screen overlay wizard component. Multi-step flow with progress bar at top showing step X of 6. Each step renders its own content. Include 'Skip' button and 'Next'/'Back' navigation. On final step completion, show confetti animation and close wizard.
Create apps/web/src/components/onboarding/steps/WelcomeStep.tsx - Step 1: Welcome message with LeadGenius branding, workspace name input field. User enters their workspace/company name.

Create apps/web/src/components/onboarding/steps/ConnectEmailStep.tsx - Step 2: Email connection form. Show two options: SMTP configuration (host, port, username, password) or SendGrid API key. Include a 'Send Test Email' button. Show success/failure indicator.

Create apps/web/src/components/onboarding/steps/ImportLeadsStep.tsx - Step 3: Lead import. Two options: CSV upload (file input with drag-drop zone) or manual entry (simple form with name, email, company fields, add multiple). Show count of leads added.

Create apps/web/src/components/onboarding/steps/CreateTemplateStep.tsx - Step 4: Create first template. Offer starter templates to choose from (Welcome email, Follow-up, Meeting request). Show editable preview. User can customize subject/body before saving.

Create apps/web/src/components/onboarding/steps/CreateSequenceStep.tsx - Step 5: Guided sequence creation. Pre-populate with the template they just created. Show a simple 2-3 step sequence: send email -> wait 2 days -> send follow-up. User can adjust delays.

Create apps/web/src/components/onboarding/steps/LaunchStep.tsx - Step 6: Launch/activation. Summary of what was set up. Big 'Activate Sequence' button. On click, activate the sequence via API. Show confetti animation (create a simple confetti effect using Framer Motion with scattered colored divs animating outward).
Create apps/web/src/store/onboarding.ts - Zustand store tracking onboarding state: isComplete (persisted), currentStep, completedSteps array, workspaceName, skipOnboarding(). Persist to localStorage.

Create apps/web/src/components/onboarding/OnboardingChecklist.tsx - dashboard sidebar widget showing remaining setup steps as a checklist. Each item shows checkmark if complete, circle if not. Clicking an incomplete item could re-open that step. Show overall completion percentage.

Mount OnboardingWizard in apps/web/src/App.tsx or Layout.tsx - show the wizard overlay when onboarding store indicates not complete AND user is authenticated. After wizard completion or skip, mark as complete.
Add OnboardingChecklist to apps/web/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx - render the checklist card in the dashboard when not all steps are complete.

Create apps/web/src/components/onboarding/OnboardingWizard.test.tsx - test that the wizard renders step 1 by default, that navigation between steps works, that skip marks onboarding as complete, and that the progress bar updates.
acceptance_criteria: Wizard shows automatically on first login when onboarding is not complete
Progress bar shows current step out of 6 total steps
Each step has appropriate form fields and validation
Skip button on each step advances without requiring input
Confetti animation plays on final step completion
Onboarding state persists (wizard does not re-show after completion or skip)
Dashboard shows onboarding checklist widget when steps remain incomplete
verification: Run `npx turbo build` from /projects/sandbox/lead-genius-pre- and confirm no TypeScript errors
Run `npx turbo test` from /projects/sandbox/lead-genius-pre- and confirm all tests pass
